text:
In the first image, I feel a sense of anticipation and possibility, standing at the entryway of a modern lecture or conference room. The empty chairs and illuminated screens invite reflective solitude before communal engagement, stirring thoughts about the rituals of gathering knowledge collectively.

In the second image, I feel curiosity and intellectual excitement. Immersed in an exhibit on research and development, I’m surrounded by bold visuals and insightful text. The creative energy and focus on innovation inspire me to consider the evolving relationship between humans and technology, and the ceaseless drive to understand and improve our world.
